DEPT. 7, JUDGE LILLIAN SING, CSR BELDON YEE, CLERK E.MONTI 2:45 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. MINUTES WERE STATED ON THE RE- CORD OUT OF THE PRESENCE OF THE CLERK. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, MARILYN MORRIS. DEFT COUNSEL, JOE BRAVO PRESENT WITHOUT DEFT. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO THE FOLLOWING: DEFT STIPULATES TO AN ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $18,551.94. DEFT TO VACATE PREMISES NO LATER THAN 2-13-94. THE ADDRESS OF THE PREMISES WAS NOT STATED FOR THE RECORD ALTHOUGH THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLT STATES THE ADDRESS AS SPACE 112/113, THE ANCHORAGE SHOPPING CTR, 2800 LEAVENWORTH ST, ALSO KNOWN AS 2801 JONES ST, SF. LEAVE IN BROOMCLEAN CONDITION. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO APPLY TOWARD JUDGMENT. DEFENSE COUNSEL TO CONFIRM WITH DEFT AS TO THE STATED CONDITIONS.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05
JUDGE WICK C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFT IN PRO PER. WITNESS SOWRN & EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVID. CASE SUBMITTED.
